posts.message:
🌸 Hanging Baskets Are Restocked! 🌸

Add a pop of color to your porch, patio, or front steps with our beautiful hanging baskets! Full, vibrant, and ready to brighten up your space.

Perfect for:
🌿 Porch décor
☀️ Spring and summer color
Available in a variety of colors and styles.

Message us to claim yours before they’re gone!
📍 Roswell Family Farm
146 Daley Rd, Dolgeville, NY 13329

🌸 Happy Mother’s Day 🌸
Today we’re celebrating all the moms who keep everything running with love, strength, and endless care.
Your dedication shows in every new life raised, every chore done, and every day you show up no matter what. 💐🐐🐓
With love, Roswell Family Farm

Excuse me ma’am… just conducting a routine egg inspection 🪿😂

Every goose has their own opinion when it’s collection time around here! Safe to say they are very invested in their eggs.🥚

🌺Hanging baskets and Planters are available for Mothers Day or sprucing up your house for Spring! 🌸
💲Self Serve, cash or Venmo 
146 Daley Rd, Dolgeville, NY 13329
